channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-21T09:46Z — 372 outages, 7,297 customers, 232 fair-weather, 5 DC-proximate
item.description: OH-AEP: 1500 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | NJ-PSEG: 802 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | NC-DEC: 302 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | BGE: 293 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | NC-DEP: 279 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
